design_intent: A serene Nordic Minimalist living room with pale oak, oat linen, soft whites, and airy proportions, grounded by clean lines and tactile restraint under cool natural daylight.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern Accent Chair with Thick Seat Cushion – Beige
selected_pieces.placement_note: Placed at the right side of the seating group, angled 20 degrees toward the sofa to create an intimate conversation corner; keep it slightly pulled forward from the wall.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern 3-Seater Sofa Premium Boucle Fabric Textured Sofa Couch with Wood Accent Armrests & Rubberwood Legs, Beige - ModernLuxe
selected_pieces.placement_note: Centered on the main wall, floated about 12–18 inches off it, with the back aligned to a pale oak coffee table and generous negative space around the silhouette.

selected_pieces.product_name: Round Coffee Table with Hidden Storage, Minimalist Fluted Accent Table Center Table
selected_pieces.placement_note: Placed centrally in front of the sofa with equal clearance on all sides, anchoring the seating area while keeping the floor plan visually light.

selected_pieces.product_name: Luck Live Modern 94.48" TV Stand and Media Console & Entertainment Centers with Large Storage Space
selected_pieces.placement_note: Mounted against the opposite wall as a low horizontal media console, visually balancing the sofa with a slim profile and leaving wall space above it open and uncluttered.

selected_pieces.product_name: Nourison Textured Home Modern Indoor Rug Ivory Beige 7'10" x 9'10"
selected_pieces.placement_note: Layered under the sofa and coffee table with roughly 8–10 inches extending beyond the front sofa legs, defining the lounge zone in a soft ivory-beige field.

selected_pieces.product_name: 2pk 50"x84" Blackout Aruba Curtain Panels Sour Cream - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Hung floor-to-ceiling on the main windows, slightly puddled or just kissing the floor to soften the cool north light and add vertical calm.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern Textured Ceramic Round Vase White - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Styled on the coffee table off-center with a few slender stems, providing a small sculptural focal point without clutter.

selected_pieces.product_name: 24"x30" Scalloped Wall Mirror Natural Wood - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Hung above the media console or on an adjacent side wall at eye level to bounce light and echo the room’s pale oak tones with a softened organic edge.
